message:
feat(storage): expand document store, harden rollback logging, and add regression tests

connection: Replace silent rollback failures with tracing::warn logging
in both commit-error and closure-error paths so transaction cleanup
failures are observable. Add tests for rollback error logging paths and
new transaction edge cases.

document: Expand DocumentStore with 251 lines of new functionality
including batch retrieval, filtered queries, and comprehensive inline
tests covering CRUD operations, edge cases, and concurrent access.

content_hash: Add 52 lines of new tests covering hash computation
determinism, empty input handling, and collision resistance properties.

metrics: Add 59 lines of new tests for storage metrics accumulation,
snapshot consistency, and counter independence.

pipeline: Expand pipeline module with 206 lines of new batch processing
logic and tests covering enqueue-embed-commit lifecycle, error recovery,
and hash-skip deduplication at enqueue time.

schema: Add 27 lines of schema hardening including migration version
checks and test coverage for schema initialization idempotency.

Cargo.toml: Add dev-dependencies (tempfile, tracing-subscriber,
tracing-test) for new integration test infrastructure.

tests/pipeline_integration_regression.rs: Add 502-line regression test
suite covering full pipeline round-trips, crash recovery simulation,
concurrent writer isolation, and batch processing edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -21,5 +21,10 @@ tracing = { workspace = true }
 [features]
 fts5 = ["dep:fsqlite-ext-fts5"]
 
+[dev-dependencies]
+tempfile = "3.25"
+tracing-subscriber = "0.3"
+tracing-test = { version = "0.2", features = ["no-env-filter"] }
+
 [lints]
 workspace = true
